hero.subheadline: Pop's Pool Service delivers guaranteed weekly cleaning with photo reports sent straight to your inbox. Family-owned in Los Angeles for 15+ years, we treat every pool like it's our own.

services.headline: Complete Pool Care Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to emergency repairs, Pop's handles it all so you never have to worry about your pool again.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough skimming, vacuuming, tile brushing, and filter cleaning with a photo report sent to your inbox every visit.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing
cards.description: Expert water chemistry management to keep your pool safe, clear, and gentle on skin all year round.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems to keep everything running smoothly.

cards.title: Green Pool Recovery
cards.description: Complete restoration of neglected or algae-infested pools — we'll transform green water back to crystal blue.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of new pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and pool automation upgrades.

cards.title: Safety Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive pool safety inspections ensuring your backyard meets all local compliance standards.

steps.title: Call or Text Us
steps.description: Reach out for a free virtual quote over the phone — no obligation, no pressure.

steps.title: Complimentary Inspection
steps.description: We assess your pool's condition and create a custom care plan tailored to your needs.

steps.title: Sit Back & Relax
steps.description: Enjoy a sparkling pool with photo reports after every clean so you always know what's happening.

about.label: Family Owned Since 2009
about.headline: Old School Hospitality Meets Modern Pool Care
about.description: Pop's Pool Service was born from Mark and Aaron's desire to blend old school hospitality with modern service. We work tirelessly to ensure your pool is clean year-round while giving you full visibility into what's happening in your backyard. Locally Los Angeles owned and family operated with 15+ years of experience, we're CPO certified and fully insured.

features.title: Photo Reports Every Visit
features.description: After every clean, we send a detailed photo report to your inbox so you always know exactly what was done.

features.title: NO Skipped Stops Policy
features.description: We guarantee we never skip your scheduled service. If we can't make your regular day, we reschedule within 24 hours.

features.title: Same Day Service Available
features.description: Need your pool cleaned fast? Call us and we can service your pool the very same day — no waiting around.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, Zero Hidden Fees
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes our NO skipped stops guarantee and photo reports after every visit. Call for your free custom quote.

guarantee.headline: Our NO Skipped Stops Promise
guarantee.description: We guarantee we will never skip your scheduled pool service. If for any reason we can't make your regular day, we'll reschedule within 24 hours — no excuses, no missed visits. Your pool stays clean, period.

faqs.question: What does your weekly pool cleaning include?
faqs.answer: Every visit includes skimming the surface, vacuuming the pool floor, brushing walls and tiles, cleaning the skimmer and pump baskets, testing and balancing water chemistry, and inspecting equipment. You'll receive a photo report to your inbox after every clean.

faqs.question: Do you really never skip a scheduled service?
faqs.answer: That's our guarantee. We have a strict NO skipped stops policy. If weather or an emergency prevents us from coming on your regular day, we reschedule within 24 hours. Your pool never goes unserviced.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: We offer same day service — we can clean your pool the very day you call. For recurring weekly service, we can typically get you on the schedule within 1-2 business days.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the San Fernando Valley and greater Los Angeles area including Reseda, Encino, Tarzana, Woodland Hills, Sherman Oaks, Calabasas, Thousand Oaks, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are CPO Certified (C-114137), registered with the Department of Public Health (PR0315023), and carry full liability insurance for your peace of mind.
